name: P90 | 巴洛克之红
descriptionEn: Easily recognizable for its unique bullpup design, the P90 is a great weapon to shoot on the move due to its high-capacity magazine and low recoil. An intricate maroon and gray Italian inspired pattern has been applied. Last Supper is served
descriptionZh: 因其独特的无托设计而更加容易辨认，多亏了 P90 高容量的弹匣和低后坐力，这把武器非常适合边移动边射击。 这把武器使用了自定义涂装，喷涂了复杂的意式风格的栗色与灰色花纹。 最后的晚餐
